entry.title: GWAC NNG07DA41B (19) awarded to WORLD WIDE TECHNOLOGY INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SEWP 4 AWARD CLASS 8 THE SEWP CONTRACTS OFFER A WIDE RANGE OF ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY INCLUDING UNIX-, LINUX-, AND WINDOWS-BASED DESKTOPS AND SERVERS, ALONG WITH PERIPHERALS, NETWORK EQUIPMENT, STORAGE DEVICES, SECURITY TOOLS, SOFTWARE, AND OTHER IT PRODUCTS AND PRODUCT BASED SOLUTIONS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:ultimateParentUEIName: WORLD WIDE TECHNOLOGY HOLDING CO. INC.
